2603.29932.title: Bethe Ansatz with a Large Language Model
2603.29932.paper_summary: We explore the capability of a Large Language Model (LLM) to perform specific computations in mathematical physics: the task is to compute the coordinate Bethe Ansatz solution of selected integrable spin chain models. We select three integrable Hamiltonians for which the solutions were unpublished; two of the Hamiltonians are actually new. We observed that the LLM semi-autonomously solved the task in all cases, with a few mistakes along the way. These were corrected after the human researchers spotted them. The results of the LLM were checked against exact diagonalization (performed by separate programs), and the derivations were also checked by the authors. The Bethe Ansatz solutions are interesting in themselves. Our second model manifestly breaks left-right invariance, but it is PT-symmetric, therefore its solution could be interesting for applications in Generalized Hydrodynamics. And our third model is solved by a special form of the nested Bethe Ansatz, where the model is interacting, but the nesting level has a free fermionic structure lacking $U(1)$-invariance. This structure appears to be unique and it was found by the LLM. We used ChatGPT 5.2 Pro and 5.4 Pro by OpenAI.
2603.29932.paper_summary_zh: 我們探討大型語言模型（LLM）在數學物理中執行特定計算的能力：任務是計算所選可積分自旋鏈模型的坐標貝特安薩茲解。我們選擇了三個解未發表的可積分哈密頓量；其中兩個哈密頓量實際上是新的。我們觀察到LLM在所有情況下半自動地解決了這個任務，過程中出現了一些錯誤。這些錯誤在研究人員發現後得到了修正。LLM的結果與精確對角化（由單獨的程序執行）進行了檢查，推導也得到了作者的確認。貝特安薩茲解本身就很有趣。我們的第二個模型明顯破壞了左右不變性，但它是PT對稱的，因此它的解對於廣義流體力學的應用可能很有趣。而我們的第三個模型則通過一種特殊形式的嵌套貝特安薩茲來解決，該模型是相互作用的，但嵌套層級具有缺乏$U(1)$不變性的自由費米子結構。這種結構似乎是獨特的，並且是由LLM發現的。我們使用了OpenAI的ChatGPT 5.2 Pro和5.4 Pro。
2603.29932.author: Balázs Pozsgay et.al.
